title: Faux Rabbit Fur Throw Blanket Bubble Blanket Beige 127 X 152 CM
features: Chic Innovation: Embrace the latest design in faux fur luxury blanket, featuring a sophisticated "Bubble" pattern crafted through cutting-edge healthy active printing and dyeing techniques. The heightened material density ensures not only plush softness but also warmth for those chilly evenings.

Sustainable Comfort: Dive into comfort guilt-free! Our throw blanket for bed is crafted from environmentally friendly synthetic fibers and dyed with non-fading colors, ensuring it is skin-safe and irritation-free. With one side featuring high-density faux rabbit fur and the other side adorned with ultra-soft crystal velvet, experience a delicate and cozy touch that's safe for direct skin contact.

Perfect Dimensions: Measuring 127X152 cm, our Bubble fluffy blanket embodies the perfect blend of size and style. Please allow a slight 1~2cm deviation due to the meticulous hand-cutting and stitching. Delivered in a vacuum-sealed package, anticipate a temporary decrease in fluffiness and the presence of wrinkles. Fear not – a single wash will restore it to its original coziness.

Gift with Thought: Elevate your gifting game with our bubble fuzzy Blanket. Perfect for occasions like Valentine's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Easter, Thanksgiving, New Year, and birthdays, this faux fur wonder is a versatile and cherished gift suitable for men, women, adults, children, and even your furry friends.

Effortless Elegance: Revel in the luxury without the hassle. Our soft throw blanket for the couch is easy to maintain – simply wash separately in cold water on a low-speed setting. No need to stress about bleach, ironing, or dry cleaning. Tumble dry for easy care and relish in the enduring softness and fluffiness after every wash.
